title: callitropsis glabra
intro: Callitropsis glabra, also known as the Australian cypress pine, is a plant species belonging to the family Cupressaceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callitropsis glabra include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Callitropsis glabra include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
